How We Deliver Managed QA

We embed structured quality systems into your engineering workflow fast, measurable, and aligned with your release cadence.

Swipe

01

Discovery & Risk Mapping

We review your release cadence, stack, and defect patterns to surface the highest-risk areas first.

  • • Stack + CI/CD review
  • • Risk area identification
  • • Regression scope definition
  • • Success metrics aligned to delivery

02

Plan & Scope

We define a 30-60 day roadmap with clear ownership and measurable outcomes.

  • • Automation + manual strategy
  • • Coverage targets
  • • Execution cadence
  • • Reporting format + SLAs (if applicable)

03

Execute & Deliver

We build and run testing that integrates cleanly with your workflow.

  • • E2E + integration automation
  • • Manual feature + regression cycles
  • • Mobile validation when needed
  • • CI reliability + maintainability

04

Measure & Optimize

We track outcomes and continuously improve speed and release confidence.

  • • Defect leakage reduction
  • • Coverage growth tracking
  • • Bottleneck removal
  • • Continuous process refinement

Services

Flexible QA execution models aligned to your release cadence, quality goals, and engineering workflow.

Automation Testing

Build scalable, maintainable test coverage integrated directly into your CI/CD pipeline to support faster, safer releases.

What We Deliver

  • End-to-end and integration automation for web and API layers
  • Risk-prioritized regression suites aligned with release scope
  • CI/CD integration with automated quality gates
  • Maintainable frameworks designed for long-term ownership

Core Stack

Playwright
Cypress
API Testing
CI/CD Pipelines

Time to Impact

How We Integrate

Integrated into your CI/CD pipelines with automated quality gates, structured reporting, and maintainable test architecture.

Tech Stack & Tools

We plug into your existing QA ecosystem across automation, test management, issue tracking, and CI/CD workflows.

Nearshore Talent Model

How Our QA Engineers Join Your Team

Scale QA capacity without operational overhead. We handle hiring, equipment, payroll, and support — your team focuses on shipping.

U.S. + LATAM Delivery Overlap

4-Step Workflow

We align on the exact QA profile, seniority, responsibilities, tooling fit across Playwright/Cypress/API/Mobile, timezone overlap, and delivery ownership with clear DoD.

Zero Operational Overhead

Get senior QA capacity with U.S. timezone overlap without managing recruiting, HR, or logistics.

Learn About Staff Augmentation
Careers at AutomataQA

We are hiring QA engineers.

Join our LATAM QA team and work directly with U.S. product and engineering teams. Own quality end-to-end - from test automation and exploratory testing to modern product validation across web and mobile.

Remote-first • LATAM talent • Daily U.S. collaboration

Apply to join our team

What we're looking for

  • QA engineers who take ownership of product quality, not just test cases
  • Strong experience in manual testing, automation, or both
  • Ability to identify edge cases and improve test coverage proactively
  • Comfortable working closely with developers and product teams
  • Clear, professional communication in English
  • Experience working with U.S. teams or fast-paced environments

What you'll get

  • Work directly with U.S.-based product and engineering teams
  • Real ownership over product quality and decisions
  • Flexible, remote-first work environment
  • Exposure to modern QA tools and workflows
  • Competitive compensation in USD
